briefing: Markets were flat and mixed today (NASDAQ +0.2%, S&P 500 -0.1%), with no clear risk-on signal. Despite having $877 in cash and 4 open slots, none of today's top candidates showed the volume-confirmed, multi-signal setup our strategy requires, so we held cash and let existing positions ride.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Patience means resisting the urge to trade just because cash or open slots are available. Even when several stocks look technically promising, a disciplined investor waits for strong, multi-signal confirmation (like a volume surge alongside momentum indicators) before committing capital, rather than forcing a trade on a lukewarm day.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 耐心是指不因為手上有現金或空餘倉位就勉強進場交易。即使有幾檔股票技術面看似不錯,有紀律的投資者仍會等待多重訊號確認(例如成交量激增配合動能指標),才願意投入資金,而不是在市況平淡時勉強出手。

market_education.summary_en: Major indices traded in a narrow range today, with the NASDAQ inching up 0.2% while the S&P 500 slipped 0.1%, reflecting a lack of strong directional conviction among investors. Momentum names in mining, crypto-adjacent, and small-cap growth sectors showed technical strength, but broader market breadth stayed muted. Without a clear catalyst, traders appeared to be in a wait-and-see posture heading into the next batch of economic data.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤走勢窄幅震盪,納指微升0.2%,標普500則小跌0.1%,反映投資人缺乏明確方向。礦業、加密貨幣相關及小型成長股的技術面表現較強,但大盤整體參與度仍然有限。在缺乏明確催化劑的情況下,市場似乎正靜待下一批經濟數據公布。
